justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered to check for other days or alternative meeting options when in-branch appointments were unavailable.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently processed all requests without asking for redundant information or making unnecessary turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The agent maintained a polite and apologetic tone, but the repeated apologies for unavailability could be slightly improved.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent consistently maintained context and intelligently expanded the search for appointments after each rejection or unavailability report.
